json.name: Shell Bomb
json.detail: Turn any tile into a shell bomb.

json.name: Shuffle Board
json.detail: Shuffle all tiles on the board.

json.name: Cross Star
json.detail: Clear one layer from the selected row and column.

json.name: +3 Moves
json.detail: Get 3 extra moves at level start.

json.name: Line + Shell Bomb
json.detail: Create one line bomb and one shell bomb at level start.

json.name: Flash Star
json.detail: Create one random flash star at level start.
